body: r/gatekeeping I'm not sure how these things are mutually exclusive.  Having the military power to actually effect change in the region, does not also mean we're obligated to take in refugees when there are plenty of neighboring countries who could do so much more easily. Why are the Persian Gulf states not accepting Syrian refugees.  They would have a much easier time assimilating there.

I posted on this same topic here yesterday but no comments.  No one at the UW is talking either. Many claim not to even know about the incident. Teaching Assistants do grade tests. Heaven help their student if they are politically conservative.

How is this anti-semitic? People can criticize individuals without being anti-semitic.  Same as those who criticize Trump, Pence, McConnell are not anti-christian.  Hell Israel is a fucked up country that has destabilized the world but I am not anti-semitic.

Hooray!   Can you end the Hatian refugees too?  Swamped here in San Diego!  It's getting crazy.  Churches are hiding ( housing) them all over, but they're also just all over downtown blending in with an already large homeless population.

A bit of an old article, but very relevant to my current work here in Kenya's refugee camps. There are 750 people registered with the UNHCR as LGBTQ+ out of hundreds of thousands and most live in constant fear, stigma and are forgotten. Today I met one of them. A fellow lesbian from Uganda. It brought tears to my eyes. I hope I didn't freak her out. Just wanted to share with you all.
